labels.博雅塔: South Anchor of the Central Axis
labels.国际商圈: National Centre for the Performing Arts
labels.胡同生活: North end of the Grand Canal
labels.锁龙井传说: Hall of Prayer for Good Harvests
labels.自强不息: Gao Junyu and Shi Pingmei memorial

storyEnByKey.天安门东\t北京乃至中国的象征，曾是24位皇帝居住的皇家宫殿，拥有世界现存规模最: The symbol of Beijing and China—the former home to twenty-four emperors and the world's largest surviving ancient wooden palace complex.
storyEnByKey.天安门西\t紧邻国家表演艺术最高殿堂。巨大的半透明玻璃幕墙在水面上反射出迷人的光: Steps from China's premier performing-arts center; vast glass walls shimmer on the water, a modern art beacon in the capital core.
storyEnByKey.王府井\t北京历史最悠久的商业步行街。从传统的百货大楼到充满复古情怀的和平菓局，: Beijing's oldest iconic pedestrian shopping street—from landmark department stores to nostalgic Heping Guoju, shopping meets culture.
storyEnByKey.西单\t北京年轻人的潮流朝圣地。这里不仅有大型购物中心，还承载了几代北京青年的流: A pilgrimage spot for young trendsetters—mega-malls and decades of youth culture memories.
storyEnByKey.军事博物馆\t展示中国五千年军事演变史。馆内陈列的大量实物坦克、飞机和导弹对历史: Five millennia of Chinese military history—real tanks, aircraft, and missiles captivate history and tech buffs alike.
storyEnByKey.公主坟\t因埋葬清代格格而得名。这里曾是北京西部的商业重镇，承载了深厚的皇室传说: Named for a buried Qing princess; once a western Beijing commercial hub of court lore and neighborhood stories.
storyEnByKey.五棵松\t2008年奥运会篮球比赛场馆所在地。如今已转型为集体育竞技、现代娱乐与: 2008 Olympic basketball venue—now a lively mix of sports, nightlife, and trendy dining.
storyEnByKey.前门\t连接天安门广场南端的商业古街。在这里可以体验复古的有轨电车，探访历史悠久: Historic shopping lanes south of Tian'anmen Square—vintage trams and time-honored Beijing brands.
storyEnByKey.和平门\t邻近著名的琉璃厂文化街。自清代起就是文人墨客聚集地，布满了经营古玩字画: Near famed Liulichang—since the Qing, scholars and centuries-old shops for curios, scrolls, and the scholar's four treasures.
storyEnByKey.宣武门\t老北京南城的门户。这里有历史悠久的南堂（天主教），见证了东西方文化的早: Gateway to old south Beijing—the South Cathedral (Catholic) stands witness to early East–West encounter.
storyEnByKey.西直门\t古时北京城运水车必经的城门。如今是全北京最繁忙的交通枢纽之一，象征着城: Ancient water-cart gate—today a transport mega-hub symbolizing a city in constant motion.
storyEnByKey.雍和宫\t从皇子府邸升级为国家最高规格的藏传佛教寺庙。这里香火鼎盛，是北京级别最: From princely mansion to Tibetan temple of national rank—Beijing's highest royal religious space, always thick with incense.
storyEnByKey.崇文门\t古时北京城的税关所在地。附近保留有明城墙遗址公园，是北京老城墙历史的最: Historic tax gate—the Ming city-wall relics park keeps memory of the old ramparts.
storyEnByKey.北京站\t北京最经典的火车站建筑。作为“建国十周年十大建筑”之一，其标志性的钟楼: Classic railway architecture—a "top ten" PRC anniversary project whose clock tower and dome greet countless first visits to the capital.
storyEnByKey.北宫门\t通往颐和园后山的门户。颐和园是中国保存最完整的皇家园林，被誉为皇家园林: Back entrance to the Summer Palace—China's best-preserved imperial garden, a "museum of imperial gardens" of stunning scale.
storyEnByKey.圆明园\t曾被誉为“万园之园”，现在的断壁残垣诉说着那段令人反思的历史，是寻找皇: Once the "Garden of Myriad Gardens"—today's ruins invite reflection; a quiet place to feel lost imperial splendor.
storyEnByKey.北京大学东门\t中国最高学府之一，校园前身为清代皇家园林。这里不仅有浓厚的学术氛: One of China's top universities on a former Qing imperial garden—rigorous scholarship meets graceful Yan Yuan landscapes.
storyEnByKey.国家图书馆\t亚洲最大的图书馆之一。现代化的建筑内部构造如同书山，收藏了大量珍贵: One of Asia's largest libraries—a "mountain of books" inside, with rare classics and modern collections.
storyEnByKey.动物园\t中国历史最悠久的动物园。这里承载了几代北京人的童年回忆，也是了解生物多: China's oldest public zoo—childhood memories for generations and a window on biodiversity.
storyEnByKey.平安里\t地处老北京核心区，周边遍布纵横交错的胡同。这里保留了最地道的生活气息和: Heart of old Beijing—dense hutongs, authentic neighborhood life, and hearty everyday food.
storyEnByKey.天坛东门\t世界文化遗产，古代皇帝祭天、祈求丰年的神圣场所。其独特的蓝色琉璃瓦圆: UNESCO site where emperors prayed for harvest—blue-glazed round halls that symbolize Chinese state ritual.
storyEnByKey.磁器口\t曾是瓷器交易中心。近期复建了曹雪芹故居（十七间半），让这里成为了《红楼: Once a porcelain market—the restored Cao Xueqin home draws Dream of the Red Chamber fans.
storyEnByKey.灯市口\t明代这里是元宵节灯市中心。如今周边汇聚了众多外交官和商界精英，保留了老: Ming-era Lantern Festival hub—now diplomats and elites amid enduring Beijing refinement.
storyEnByKey.北新桥\t邻近著名的簋街，是北京最火爆的深夜食堂聚集地。这里的“锁龙井”传说也为: Beside legendary Guijie—late-night food capital; tales of the "dragon-lock well" add mystery.
storyEnByKey.南锣鼓巷\t全北京人气最旺的胡同。这里完整保存了元代的街巷格局，汇聚了无数特色小: Beijing's busiest hutong block—Yuan-era lanes, indie shops, and creative youth.
storyEnByKey.北海北\t通往最古老的皇家园林——北海。湖畔白塔、壮丽九龙壁，以及“让我们荡起双: Gateway to Beihai—the oldest imperial lakeside park; white dagoba, Nine-Dragon Wall, and "row the boat" nostalgia.
storyEnByKey.朝阳门\t以流线型的银河SOHO建筑闻名，展现了现代北京的前卫面貌。这里是传统胡: Famous for Zaha Hadid's Galaxy SOHO—futuristic face of Beijing where hutongs meet sci-fi curves.
storyEnByKey.呼家楼\t紧邻举世闻名的央视大楼“大裤衩”。这里是北京的传媒与金融心脏，现代建筑: Neighbors the iconic CCTV Tower—media and finance heart with a jaw-dropping skyline.
storyEnByKey.奥林匹克公园\t北京中轴线北端的明珠。在这里可以一览2008与2022两届奥运会: North-axial showcase of 2008 and 2022 Olympic landmarks—modern sports spirit on full display.
storyEnByKey.什刹海\t北京最浪漫的水域。周边遍布名胜古迹与历史名人故居，夜晚则是灯火通明的酒: Romantic lakes and canals—historic sites and celebrity homes by day, neon bar strips by night.
storyEnByKey.鼓楼大街\t曾是古城的报时中心。在这里你可以登楼远眺，领略北京中轴线的壮阔，感受: Old city's timekeeping quarter—climb Bell and Drum towers for the axis panorama and slow hutong life.
storyEnByKey.中国美术馆\t中国唯一的国家级现代艺术馆，展示了无数近现代中国画和油画精品。其建: China's national art museum—masterworks of modern Chinese painting in a Chinese–Western hybrid building.
storyEnByKey.珠市口\t中轴线上连接南北城的重要节点。附近有著名的丰泽园饭店和传统戏曲演出场所: Axis node tying north and south—Fengzeyuan dining and traditional opera keep strong old-Beijing flavor.
storyEnByKey.天桥\t老北京民间技艺的发源地。现在已转型为现代化的演艺区，在这里能看到最精彩的: Cradle of folk performance arts—today a modern stage for acrobatics and cutting-edge drama.
storyEnByKey.宛平城\t1937年“七七事变”的发生地。卢沟桥上的石狮子和宛平城的弹痕记录了那: Site of the 1937 Marco Polo Bridge Incident—stone lions and fortress walls remember the war of resistance.
storyEnByKey.香山\t驰名中外的红叶观赏胜地，也是清代皇家“三山五园”之一。双清别墅曾是建国前: World-famous red-leaf mountains and a Qing "Three Hills and Five Gardens" estate—Shuangqing Villa hosted pre-founding state work.
storyEnByKey.将台\t由旧工厂车间华丽转身的世界级艺术社区。在这里你可以探访各种先锋展览，体验: 798—factory halls turned global art quarter—industrial grit meets avant-garde galleries.
storyEnByKey.望京\t北京最大的韩国人聚居区，充满了浓郁的异国情调和现代感。扎哈设计的望京SO: Beijing's largest Korean quarter—global vibe; Wangjing SOHO as visual anchor.
storyEnByKey.环球度假区\t世界级电影主题度假区。这里集合了哈利波特、功夫熊猫等经典电影场景，: World-class movie-resort—Wizarding World, Kung Fu Panda sets, total immersion.
storyEnByKey.亮马桥\t北京城市更新的样板。亮马河畔的咖啡厅和艺术装置营造了极具品质的滨水休闲: Model riverfront renewal—Liangma River cafés and art for quality waterfront leisure.
storyEnByKey.团结湖\t这里是北京的潮流风向标。三里屯的灯红酒绿、先锋时装与独特的使馆区氛围在: Beijing's trend vane—Sanlitun lights, fashion fronts, and embassy-zone atmosphere converge.
storyEnByKey.国贸\t北京的CBD核心。摩天大楼林立，是中国尊的最佳观测点，象征着中国融入全球: CBD core—forest of towers, prime China Zun views, symbol of China's global business pulse.
storyEnByKey.潘家园\t中国名气最大的古玩市场所在地。在这里你可以感受充满市井气的“鬼市”和博: China's most famous curio market—"ghost market" buzz and deep folk-art culture.
storyEnByKey.五道口\t被戏称为“宇宙中心”。这里汇聚了清华、北语等名校，是多元文化冲撞和最硬: Nicknamed "center of the universe"—Tsinghua, BLCU, and more; multicultural clash and hard-tech mindset.
storyEnByKey.模式口\t京西古道的起点。这里保留了驼铃古道的历史风貌，附近的法海寺明代壁画更是: Start of the western old caravan road—camel-bell scenery; Ming murals at Fahai Temple are national treasures.
storyEnByKey.牛街\t北京最著名的回民聚居区。这里有历史悠久的牛街礼拜寺，更是北京清真小吃的极: Famous Hui quarter—historic mosque and ultimate halal snack pilgrimage.
storyEnByKey.菜市口\t晚清历史的见证地。曾是著名的刑场和文化街，周边留存有大量士子故居与早期: Late-Qing witness—once execution ground and literary street; scholars' homes and early press sites remain.
storyEnByKey.陶然亭\t中国四大名亭之一所在地。不仅有精美的园林建筑，还是早期中共领导人秘密会: One of China's four famous pavilions—graceful garden and an early CCP secret-meeting red site.
storyEnByKey.北土城\t元代大都北侧城墙遗址。每年春天的“海棠花溪”美不胜收，土城遗址则静静守: Yuan Dadu's north wall line—spring "crabapple river" splendor; earthen ramparts guard Yuan memory.
storyEnByKey.北京南站\t北京规模最大的综合性高铁客运站。其巨大的穹顶设计宛如一架降落的飞碟，: Beijing's largest integrated HSR terminus—a flying-saucer dome symbolizing China speed.
storyEnByKey.奥体中心\t1990年亚运会主战场。这里见证了中国体育崛起的每一个台阶，充满怀旧: Main stage of the 1990 Asian Games—nostalgic arenas still throb with competitive spirit.
storyEnByKey.中关村\t中国科技创新的心脏。从昔日的“中关村大街”到如今的全球创业高地，这里代: Heart of China's innovation—from "Zhongguancun Street" to a global startup summit—China's future in one strip.
storyEnByKey.朝阳公园\t北京四环内最大的城市公园。周边的凤凰中心以其莫比乌斯环结构成为当代建: Biggest park inside the Fourth Ring—Phoenix Center's Möbius loop as contemporary architecture icon.
storyEnByKey.金台路\t人民日报社所在地，其独特的建筑外型曾在网上引发热议。这里是北京传媒圈的: People's Daily HQ—a debated silhouette anchoring Beijing's media geography.
storyEnByKey.景泰\t得名于国宝级艺术品——景泰蓝。附近建有景泰蓝博物馆，可以近距离观看点蓝、: Named for national-treasure cloisonné—museums demonstrate wire-inlay and enameling up close.
storyEnByKey.慈寿寺\t站旁矗立着明代玲珑塔，曾是万寿寺的一部分。古塔威严，夕阳下颇有“玲珑夕: Ming Linglong Pagoda beside the line—once part of Wanshou Temple; "Linglong sunset" city mood.
storyEnByKey.东四\t这里保留了最具“皇家贵气”的胡同区。东四头条到十四条，每条巷子都藏着不为: Hutongs with an imperial aristocratic air—Dongsi First to Fourteenth Alleys hide storied mansions.
storyEnByKey.大钟寺\t因收藏有巨大的“永乐大钟”而闻名。钟体刻满佛经，声闻数十里，是中国铸造: Home of the giant Yongle Bell—Buddhist sutras cast in bronze heard for miles—a casting marvel.
storyEnByKey.常营\t东边最出名的美食聚集地之一。这里的常营清真寺历史悠久，周边更有数不清的地: Eastern food mecca—historic mosque and endless halal eateries.
storyEnByKey.魏公村\t紧邻中央民族大学。这里汇聚了全国各民族的学生，周边的餐厅提供了极具特色: Beside Minzu University—students from every ethnicity; Xinjiang, Tibetan, and more on the plate.
storyEnByKey.良乡大学城\t北京南部的学术引擎。数所重点大学的分校在此聚集，形成了一座充满朝气: Southern academic engine—major university branches form a brisk modern college town.
storyEnByKey.通州北关\t京杭大运河的北端起点。昔日漕运繁忙的码头，如今已成为北京副中心生态与: North terminus of the Grand Canal—grain wharves of old meet sub-center ecology and history.
storyEnByKey.森林公园南门\t北京最大的城市公园入口。这里是徒步爱好者的天堂，大片的湿地与森林: Gateway to Beijing's biggest urban forest park—wetlands and woods for hikers escaping the rush.
storyEnByKey.北新桥\t这里是北京夜生活的灵魂之一，附近的簋街红灯笼高挂，热辣的小龙虾是夏夜永: Soul of Beijing nightlife—Guijie red lanterns and spicy crayfish define summer nights.
storyEnByKey.大望路\t北京乃至亚洲的高端百货之冠。SKP商场不仅是购物中心，更是国际时尚品牌: SKP crown of regional luxury retail—runway for global fashion, not just a mall.
storyEnByKey.西单\t北京传统的青春商业地标。这里既有高端购物广场，也有充满怀旧感的学生市场，: Classic youth retail landmark—malls and nostalgic student bazaars, Beijing's pop laboratory.
storyEnByKey.金安桥\t首钢园的另一个重要入口。这里的旧工业构筑物被巧妙改建为办公与艺术空间，: Another Shougang Park entry—blast furnaces reborn as offices and art, raw sci-fi edge.
storyEnByKey.白塔寺(阜成门)\t拥有元代由尼泊尔匠人监造的雄伟白塔。周边的胡同通过微更新，成: Yuan white dagoba by Nepalese masters—refreshed hutongs and Lu Xun memory make a literary-arts lane.
storyEnByKey.和平门\t紧邻著名的琉璃厂古玩街。这里是中国书画和古籍交易的中心，散发着浓郁的书: Against Liulichang curio street—center for scrolls, rare books, and Rongbaozhai heritage.
storyEnByKey.双井\t北京东部的优质宜居与消费中心。这里有极高的生活便利度和丰富的餐饮文化，是: Eastern sweet-spot for living and spending—convenience and dining mirror middle-class Beijing.
storyEnByKey.广安门内\t地处北京建城的核心区。附近的法源寺以丁香花和深厚的佛学底蕴闻名，是了: Core of old city founding—Fayuan Temple lilacs and Buddhist depth explain south Beijing.
storyEnByKey.永定门外\t北京中轴线的南起始点。宏伟的永定门城楼巍然矗立，标志着北京城古老布局: South anchor of the Central Axis—Yongding Gate tower completes the old cosmological layout.
storyEnByKey.桥湾\t北京通过“河道复原”打造的胡同水系公园。在这里可以体验到消失已久的“小桥: Canal-restored hutong waters—"small bridge, flowing water, hutong homes" reborn.
storyEnByKey.广渠门内\t抗清名将袁崇焕的墓祠所在地。一段感天动地的忠义故事与两代人的守墓传奇: Tomb shrine of Ming loyalist Yuan Chonghuan—loyalty and two generations of tomb-keeping add tragic beauty.
storyEnByKey.丽泽商务区\t北京西南部正在崛起的新金融中心。扎哈设计的丽泽SOHO拥有世界最高: Rising southwest CBD—Zaha Hadid's LiZe SOHO and record vertical atrium feel pure sci-fi.
storyEnByKey.北京南站\t作为中国最先进的高铁站之一，其宏大的椭圆设计象征着时代的飞速前进，是: Among China's most advanced HSR stations—oval megastructure marks an era of high-speed arrival.
storyEnByKey.园博园\t一座汇集了全国及世界各地园林艺术精品的大型公园。通过永定河生态修复，展: Mega-park of national and world garden arts—Yongding River repair harmonizes nature and design.
storyEnByKey.国家植物园\t中国首个国家植物园。这里不仅有先进的植物温室，还有历史悠久的唐代古: China's first national botanical garden—modern glasshouses and Tang-era Wofo Temple, nature plus culture.
storyEnByKey.颐和园西门\t颐和园最静谧的入口。从此进入可以直接漫步西堤，仿西湖而建的堤岸在春: Summer Palace's quietest gate—west embankment like Hangzhou's West Lake, peach blossoms in spring.
storyEnByKey.清华东路西口\t邻近中国顶级理工学府——清华大学。校园内融合了美式学院风格与中式: Beside top STEM Tsinghua—American collegiate forms meet Qing garden grace, calm and enduring.
storyEnByKey.大望路\t北京东部的时尚地标。SKP不仅是世界级的奢侈品聚集地，更是北京精英阶层: Eastern fashion pole—SKP as global luxury podium for elite consumption culture.
storyEnByKey.柳芳\t这里曾是典型的老工业大院区。随着城市更新，保留了浓厚的老北京社区人情味和: Once industrial courtyard blocks—renewal keeps neighborly warmth and corner shops.
storyEnByKey.中关村\t中国数字时代的缩影。这里孕育了无数知名的互联网大厂，是所有科技发烧友来: Portrait of China's digital age—tech giants born here; geek mecca for visitors.
storyEnByKey.知春路\t邻近航空航天大学。这里是北京高科技人才密度最高的地方之一，街道两旁充满: Near aerospace universities—dense tech talent, ByteDance and Lenovo pace, ambition on every corner.
storyEnByKey.新首钢\t旧钢厂的高炉成了最酷的时尚秀场。这里不仅是北京城市更新的教科书级案例，: Blast furnaces as runways—Shougang renewal textbook and incubator for sci-fi industry.
storyEnByKey.六道口\t周边高校林立，如农大、林大等。这里被郁郁葱葱的学术气息包围，有着北京最: Ringed by CAU, BFA, and more—green campus mood and rich student retail life.
storyEnByKey.北运河西\t北京东部的“水脉”入口。在这里，你可以看到运河文化的现代化重生，感受: Eastern "water artery"—modern canal culture reborn between millennial shipping and future city.
storyEnByKey.大望路\t这里是北京商业能量最集中的地方。无论是奢侈品牌还是潮流趋势，在大望路总: Raw commercial energy—luxury labels and trends meet world-class window-shopping.
